notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Crews reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Otto Lopez. Keibert Ruiz scores. Luis García Jr. to 3rd. James Wood to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop Otto Lopez.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Connor Norby. Dylan Crews out at 2nd. Curtis Mead out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Connor Norby. Dylan Crews out at 2nd. Curtis Mead out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Stowers reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Brad Lord, assist to first baseman Luis García Jr.

notableEvents.detail: José Tena flies out to left fielder Heriberto Hernández in foul territory.
